data.title: Web UI: voice input (microphone + STT), optional TTS responses

data.body: Requested by David (came up twice: the Lovable JARVIS reference's animated mic button + ElevenLabs TTS, and again after seeing the v0.1 cockpit). Deliberately excluded from NAVI-17 v1. Scope when picked up: mic button in ChatInput (Web Speech API or local STT -- evaluate; keep localhost-only posture, no cloud STT without explicit decision), optional TTS for answers (ElevenLabs was the reference; a local/offline option may fit the privacy posture better). Backlog until the v1 chat UI (NAVI-17 step 2) is done.
